g.text: T2: Buffer Pool Evicts Page (Steal Policy)

text.tspan: // Running recovery 1 time, 10 times, or 1000 times
// Running recovery 1 time, 10 times, or 1000 times
// Buffer pool: page 42 dirty in memory (pageLSN=1500)
// Buffer pool: page 42 dirty in memory (pageLSN=1500)
// Memory pressure → evict page 42 to disk
// Memory pressure → evict page 42 to disk
